Refunds up to INR 5000 auto-approve. Allowed: Publish catalog, Archive catalog, Change price, Commit inventory, Accept orders, Reject orders, Fulfilment, Promise remedy, Issue refund.

When you choose a refund at or below INR 5000, it executes immediately. A larger refund stops for one-time approval before execution.

Assistant: Samantha · Role: Seller operations · Status: active

Mandate: active · ONDC network
